user.title: Connect to WhatsApp Bridge
user.description: Configure the connection to your WAHA instance. Make sure the WAHA container is running before proceeding.

data.api_key: API Key (leave empty if not configured)

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the WAHA server (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
data_description.api_key: The same API key set in docker-compose.yml

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to WAHA. Check host, port and API key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This WhatsApp Bridge instance is already configured.
